tasks: On client, write the first usage summary for useradd to /root/rhcsa10-man.txt using local documentation.
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Write the first usage summary for useradd to /root/rhcsa10-man.txt
solution_commands: if man useradd 2>/dev/null | col -b | awk 'BEGIN{found=0} /^SYNOPSIS/{found=1} found{print; count++} count>=2{exit}' > /root/rhcsa10-man.txt && test -s /root/rhcsa10-man.txt; then :; else useradd --help | grep -m1 -A1 '^Usage' > /root/rhcsa10-man.txt; fi
